title: Pack of 120 Cotton Wool Balls, Super Soft, 100% Pure Cotton, Perfect for Everyday Use

features: Super Soft: Delicate and luxurious, these cotton wool balls are crafted to be exceptionally soft, providing a gentle touch for your skin.
Pure Cotton: Made from 100% pure cotton, our wool balls offer a natural and breathable option, free from synthetic materials, ensuring a pure and comfortable experience.
Versatile Use: Ideal for everyday use, these cotton wool balls serve a multitude of purposes, from makeup removal to applying skincare products or even first aid applications.
Gentle on Skin: Designed with sensitivity in mind, these wool balls are gentle on the skin, making them suitable for all ages, including babies, ensuring a soothing and irritation-free experience.

Convenient Pack: With 120 cotton wool balls in each pack, you'll have an ample supply for an extended period. Conveniently packaged for easy storage, these balls are ready to enhance your daily self-care rituals.

product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Tools & Accessories › Cotton Balls, Pads & Buds
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always use a cleanser made to remove makeup, apply as directed. Take care around the eye, the skin is thinner, do not pull or rub. Apply and leave as cleanser directs to help dissolve makeup,making it easier and gentler on the skin to remove. Rubbing at the skin can irritate.
